atmosphere.mood: Tense and isolated. The fire keeps the dark at bay — barely. Anything goes here.
atmosphere.lighting: A central firepit and a few guttering torches — deep shadows fill every corner
atmosphere.smells: Woodsmoke, animal hides, wet earth, and something roasting that nobody is asking about
atmosphere.sounds: Crackling fire, distant wolf howls, hushed deals, and the occasional nervous laugh

layout: A low timber structure thrown up at a woodland crossroads where four rough roads meet. Packed-earth floor, a central firepit ringed with river stones, rough plank tables on uneven legs. Animal hides cover gaps in the walls against the cold. A lean-to stable out back for horses — if you trust the stable hand.

drinks.name: Rough cider
drinks.description: Sharp and cloudy, pressed from whatever was at hand

drinks.name: Moonshine
drinks.description: Clear as water, twice as dangerous

drinks.name: Forest ale
drinks.description: Dark and smoky, brewed in a back-woods cask

drinks.name: Berry wine
drinks.description: Fermented blackberries from the deep woods — dark red and surprisingly potent

drinks.name: Pine spirit
drinks.description: A rough spirit infused with pine resin — clears the lungs or kills you trying

drinks.name: Woodman's tot
drinks.description: A cheap pour of whatever's left in the barrel — no frills, no questions

drinks.name: Water
drinks.description: A cup of stream water. Probably safe.

food.name: Game stew
food.description: Rabbit, probably. Or something close enough.

food.name: Foraged mushrooms
food.description: Sauteed in lard. The cook assures you they're the good kind.

food.name: Hard bread
food.description: Days old, still edible if you soak it in the stew

food.name: Salt pork
food.description: Cured strips of questionable origin, chewy and dense

food.name: Dried venison
food.description: Strips of salted deer meat, tough and smoky — good for the road

food.name: Roasted rabbit
food.description: A whole rabbit on a spit, charred at the edges and dripping with fat — the hunter's special
